Class GridStats

java.lang.Object
simulation.entities.GridStats
public class GridStats extends Object
Computes live statistics from the current grid state.

An instance is created each time step by calling

invalid reference 
#compute(Grid)
. It is then passed to the
invalid reference 
StatsPanel
for display.

  • Method Details

    • compute

      public static GridStats compute(Grid grid, int step)
      Scans the full grid and returns a new GridStats instance.
      Parameters:
      grid - current grid (must not be null)
      step - current simulation step
      Returns:
      computed statistics

    • getStep

      public int getStep()
      Returns:
      current simulation step

    • getTotalCells

      public int getTotalCells()
      Returns:
      total number of cells

    • getIntactCells

      public int getIntactCells()
      Returns:
      number of intact (unburned) cells

    • getBurningCells

      public int getBurningCells()
      Returns:
      number of currently burning cells

    • getBurnedCells

      public int getBurnedCells()
      Returns:
      number of fully burned cells

    • getBurningPercent

      public double getBurningPercent()
      Returns:
      percentage of cells that are burning (0–100)

    • getBurnedPercent

      public double getBurnedPercent()
      Returns:
      percentage of cells that are burned (0–100)

    • getIntactPercent

      public double getIntactPercent()
      Returns:
      percentage of cells that are intact (0–100)

    • getForestCells

      public int getForestCells()
      Returns:
      number of forest cells

      public int getWetZoneCells()
      Returns:
      number of wet zone cells

      Returns:
      number of firebreak cells

      Returns:
      number of water cells

      public int getUrbanCells()
      Returns:
      number of urban zone cells

      public double getAvgHumidity()
      Returns:
      average humidity across all cells
